description: Projects one or more data sets onto the metagene representation of another data set
author: Pablo Tamayo, Marc-Danie Nazaire
plan:
## MetageneProjection GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MetageneProjection is a GenePattern module that Projects one or more data sets onto the metagene representation of another data set

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 25 parameters:
- Required: model.gct.file, model.cls.file, model.preprocessing.file, num.characters
- Optional: test.gct.file, test.cls.file, test.preprocessing.file, identifier, k.projection, algorithm, number.of.iterations, seed, post.projection.normalization, heatmap.row.norm, heatmap.color.scheme, confidence.threshold, phenotype.plotting.colors, phenotype.plotting.symbols, symbol.scaling, kernel, cost, gamma, theta, lambda, model.set.refinement

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>MetageneProjection.R metagene.projection.cmdline -l<libdir> -m<model.gct.file> -d<model.cls.file> -p<model.preprocessing.file> <test.gct.file> <test.cls.file> <test.preprocessing.file> -u<num.characters> -i<identifier> -k<k.projection> -o<algorithm> -n<number.of.iterations> -s<seed> -j<post.projection.normalization> -w<heatmap.row.norm> -h<heatmap.color.scheme> -f<confidence.threshold> -v<phenotype.plotting.colors> -q<phenotype.plotting.symbols> -y<symbol.scaling> -e<kernel> -c<cost> -g<gamma> -a<theta> -b<lambda> -r<model.set.refinement>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: model.gct.file
parameters.description: The model .gct data file

parameters.name: model.cls.file
parameters.description: The model .cls data file

parameters.name: model.preprocessing.file
parameters.description: The pre-processing parameters for the model dataset

parameters.name: test.gct.file
parameters.description: The test .gct or zip of .gct data files

parameters.name: test.cls.file
parameters.description: The test .cls or zip of .cls data files

parameters.name: test.preprocessing.file
parameters.description: The pre-processing parameters for the test dataset

parameters.name: num.characters
parameters.description: Number of characters to use to identify classes from the .cls files

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Prefix to name output files

parameters.name: k.projection
parameters.description: Number of metagenes in projection

parameters.name: algorithm
parameters.description: Algorithm for Metagene Projection

parameters.name: number.of.iterations
parameters.description: Number of algorithm iterations

parameters.name: seed
parameters.description: Random seed to initialize metagene matrices (Note\: results may only be reproducible on the same platform)

parameters.name: post.projection.normalization
parameters.description: apply post-projection normalization

parameters.name: heatmap.row.norm
parameters.description: row-normalize (standardize) the rows in the heat map

parameters.name: confidence.threshold
parameters.description: Confidence threshold (Brier score) to separate call from no-calls

parameters.name: phenotype.plotting.colors
parameters.description: Plotting colors for phenotypes

parameters.name: phenotype.plotting.symbols
parameters.description: Plotting symbols for phenotypes

parameters.name: symbol.scaling
parameters.description: Graphical scaling for symbols in plots and plot legends

parameters.name: kernel
parameters.description: Kernel function for SVM

parameters.name: cost
parameters.description: cost function for SVM

parameters.name: gamma
parameters.description: Gamma coefficient for radial base function kernel

parameters.name: theta
parameters.description: Smoothing parameter only used for the NSNMF.div algorithm

parameters.name: lambda
parameters.description: Sparse parameter used only for the SNMF algorithm

parameters.name: model.set.refinement
parameters.description: perform model set refinement
